scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @rag/renderer && npm run build --workspace @rag/main
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start --workspace @rag/main
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @rag/renderer && npm run typecheck --workspace @rag/main
scripts.build:chat: npm run build --workspace @ragchat/renderer && npm run build --workspace @ragchat/main
scripts.start:chat: npm run build:chat && npm run start --workspace @ragchat/main
